name: Bermuda Club
about: Bermuda Club is a modern third place combining coworking, wellness, and golf under one roof. The facility offers a full suite of amenities including private offices, a gym, sauna, cold plunges, and four Full Swing golf simulators. Membership provides access to all spaces and is designed for busy professionals seeking productivity, health, and community in a single location. The venue hosts social events, corporate gatherings, and private parties, creating a unique environment that blends work, play, and recovery.
why_golfers_like_it: Four premium Full Swing golf simulators for year-round play
Dedicated custom putting green for short game practice
Social events and competitions foster a vibrant golf community
Integration with work and wellness spaces for a holistic lifestyle

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen and food service available
Full bar service and speakeasy area for cocktails

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if clubs are provided, so members should plan to bring their own golf clubs for simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue has an on-site kitchen and full bar service for all members and guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify time requirements for 18 holes, but simulators typically allow for 18-hole rounds in approximately 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bermuda Club hosts family-friendly events and is open to families, as evidenced by events like 'parents night out' and birthday celebrations.
